title: Google Drive file not found error
symptom: When executing the Upload File node, n8n throws a 'File not found' error indicating that the specified file ID does not exist.
applies_when: File ID is incorrect or outdated
not_this_if: File ID is valid and accessible
root_cause: This error occurs when the file ID provided in the Google Drive node does not correspond to an existing file in the user's Google Drive account. This often happens when workflows are shared and contain file IDs from the original user's environment.
fix_steps: Refresh the list of files in the Google Drive node
Select the correct file from the updated list
agent_instruction: Refresh the file list in the Google Drive node and select the correct file.
